title: ranunculus inconspectus
intro: Ranunculus inconspectus, also known as lesser buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant contains a toxic compound called ranunculin, which has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus inconspectus include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and potentially treat certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus inconspectus are typically made from the plant's roots or rhizomes, which can be dried, powdered, or infused in oil to create topical creams, salves, or tinctures.
